body_errors.note: Body line 1 reads τὴν φιλίαν before ἀνανεώσασθαι; transcript omits τὴν φιλίαν, so this word is in the wrong context.
Printed text has ἔδωχεν, not ἔδωκαν.
Printed text has ἐπιστολὴς (singular), not ἐπιστολὰς.
Printed text has ἐπιστολαί without final grave accent; if accentuation is being measured, transcript differs, but this is minor.
Printed text has παράκλησιν without issue? uncertain minor; not counted confidently.

apparatus_errors.note: Apparatus line 3 should read απεστειλαν ℵ, matching the page.
Apparatus line 5 should read τοις- ℵV, not τοι- ℵV.
Apparatus line 7 should read αρχιερεα, Δαριου (?) δ on the page; transcript formatting around this entry is corrupted.
Apparatus line 9 should read om και ημων τα 3° V; transcript has garbled οση και η om τα 3° V.
Apparatus line 11 should read και εν 3° ℵ, not οη εν 3° ℵ.
Apparatus line 15 should read (περος V12a?) as printed? uncertain but transcript spacing is off.
Apparatus line 18 should read ἐπιστοησε A / επιστοησε A; transcript has wrong sigma insertion.

note: Body is mostly accurate but has a few clear substantive mismatches near the top; apparatus has several definite garblings and should not be signed off.
